recommendations.title: Good Hair
recommendations.overview: An exposé of comic proportions that only Chris Rock could pull off, GOOD HAIR visits beauty salons and hairstyling battles, scientific laboratories and Indian temples to explore the way hairstyles impact the activities, pocketbooks, sexual relationsh

recommendations.title: Chris Rock: Tamborine
recommendations.overview: Chris Rock takes the stage for his first comedy special in 10 years, filled with searing observations on fatherhood, infidelity and American politics.

recommendations.title: John Mulaney: The Comeback Kid
recommendations.overview: Armed with boyish charm and a sharp wit, the former "SNL" writer offers sly takes on marriage, his beef with babies and the time he met Bill Clinton.

recommendations.title: Chris Rock: Selective Outrage
recommendations.overview: Chris Rock delivers an electric stand-up set on non-racist yoga pants, spoiling his kids, the Kardashians and his thoughts on the Will Smith fiasco.

recommendations.title: Head of State
recommendations.overview: When a presidential candidate dies unexpectedly in the middle of the campaign, the Democratic party unexpectedly picks a Washington, D.C. alderman as his replacement.

recommendations.title: Hasan Minhaj: Homecoming King
recommendations.overview: Comic Hasan Minhaj of "The Daily Show" shares personal stories about racism, immigrant parents, prom night horrors and more in this stand-up special.

recommendations.title: Trevor Noah: Son of Patricia
recommendations.overview: Trevor Noah gets out from behind the "Daily Show" desk and takes the stage for a stand-up special that touches on racism, immigration, camping and more.

recommendations.title: Miss Sloane
recommendations.overview: An ambitious lobbyist faces off against the powerful gun lobby in an attempt to pass gun control legislation.

recommendations.title: Margot at the Wedding
recommendations.overview: Margot Zeller is a short story writer with a sharp wit and an even sharper tongue. On the eve of her estranged sister Pauline's wedding to unemployed musician/artist/depressive Malcolm at the family seaside home, Margot shows up unexpectedly to rekin

recommendations.title: I Think I Love My Wife
